title: Christmas Concepts® 8 Piece Red Felt Christmas Snowflake Place Mat And Coaster Set - 4 Place Mats + 4 Coasters
features: Beautiful festive tableware for your Christmas dinner.
The Christmas snowflake place mat is a great addition to the home during the Christmas season.
The place mat is soft to the touch yet strong enough to protect tables from plates and bowls etc
Perfect for Christmas celebrations and parties.
Complete set of 4 per order (4 x place mats and 4 x coasters.) Material: Felt. Product dimensions of each mat: 40 cm x 29.5 cm.
